title: ZOENHOU 30 Pack Plastic Cups, 260ml 9oz Multi Coloured Stackable Plastic Drinking Cups Tumblers Set, Picnic Cup for Drink Party, Event, Wedding, BBQ’s Travels, Camp
features: DURABLE - The plastic cups are made of food grade PP plastic, they are reusable, soft, flexible, rugged, could stand up to some tapping, and banging, and are break-resistant, even they dont break when knocked over. With smooth edges that will not hurt you.

LIGHTWEIGHT BUT RUGGED - These reusable plastic cups are wide enough at the bottom that they don't tip easily. They are lightweight but rugged. Thin and light enough to be easy to use for you, big enough to be a decent-sized drink.

STACKABLE - The plastic drinking cups are easy to clean, just stick them in the dishwasher. They are also stackable and don't take up much space, you can pour hot or cold drinks in them without any worry. Can be stuck a name sticker on each cup so you know which cup was yours.

VIBRANT COLOR - There are a total of 30 multi coloured plastic cups in the pack, 5 different colors, and holds 260 ml/9oz, yellow, blue, orange, light green, rose, 6 for each color. All the colors are bright, and the mix of colors helps you keep track of which drink is yours.

PRACTICAL - Our picnic cups are perfect-sized, they are easy for little hands to hold, and the colors are bright and fun. Not only use as dice cups, juice cups, beer cups, but also ideal for parties, busy households, large gatherings, barbecues, camping, traveling, picnic, etc.
description: About Us ZOENHOU is an experienced seller of plastic tumblers, and we aim to provide high-quality products with fantastic stability, and perfect appearance to our consumers. Features : ● Good alternative to glass cups or other fragile cups. ● They are the perfect size for cold drinks and stack nicely in your cabinets leaving plenty of room. ● Enough colours to please all the family and strong and robust, clean well in dishwasher. ● Great for parties, parties, barbecue, camping, home, office, and really colorful. ●The plastic cups are also beautiful colors and keep drinks cold for a long time. You can even drink warm drinks in them also which is great. ●Please do not hesitate to contact us if any issues with our party cups you can get 30 days of worry-free refund, 7 days of 24-hour service after receiving it. Just remember that your satisfaction is our first priority. Specifications : Material: PP plastic Color: yellow, blue, orange, light green, rose Size: Capacity: 260ml/9oz Package Includes : 30 x Reusable Plastic Cups Thoughtful Service : Any questions, please feel free to contact us on Amazon, we will answer and solve for you within 24 hours. Happy shopping!
